708.reason: [Incorrect lookahead condition: using peek(2) to detect Decl is unreliable because Decl starts with 'const', 'int', or 'char', not necessarily followed by '(' two tokens ahead. This causes premature termination or infinite loops.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead condition: using peek(2) to detect Decl is unreliable because Decl starts with 'const', 'int', or 'char', not necessarily followed by '(' two tokens ahead. This causes premature termination or infinite loops.]

714.reason: [Incorrect lookahead condition: FuncDef starts with FuncType ('void'/'int'/'char'), but this check only looks for MAINTK one token ahead, which may skip valid FuncDefs or cause incorrect parsing when MainFuncDef is not immediately after.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead condition: FuncDef starts with FuncType ('void'/'int'/'char'), but this check only looks for MAINTK one token ahead, which may skip valid FuncDefs or cause incorrect parsing when MainFuncDef is not immediately after.]
